name: @minimajs/cli
description: CLI for running, watching, and compiling MinimaJS TypeScript projects

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile ./bin/cli.js --target node --format esm --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node' --external esbuild --external typescript --external esbuild-node-externals --external execa --external dotenv --external dotenv-expand --external ora --external chalk --external pretty-ms --external pretty-bytes --external semver --external citty && tsc -p ./tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly --noEmit false

author: Adil <adil.sudo@gmail.com>
